Objective: Tổng quan: Báo giá phát triển Brand Portal (Partner Admin) cho VCreator Global. Brand/Partner tự quản lý campaigns, theo dõi content, xem analytics, quản lý budget. 3 roles: Brand Owner, Brand Manager, Brand Viewer. Data isolation: country_code + partner_code (ADR-001).

Use case: Brand login bằng email/password. MFA bắt buộc cho Owner. Session management.
Note:
- Email/password authentication (tách biệt OAuth Creator)
- MFA bắt buộc cho Brand Owner (TOTP hoặc SMS)
- MFA optional cho Manager/Viewer
- Session management: timeout configurable
- Password policy enforcement
- Forgot password flow

Use case: Role-based access: Brand Owner (full), Brand Manager (campaigns + content), Brand Viewer (read-only).
Note:
- 3 roles: brand_owner, brand_manager, brand_viewer
- Brand Owner: full access (team, settings, campaigns, finance)
- Brand Manager: campaigns, content, creators, basic analytics
- Brand Viewer: read-only analytics, content view
- API middleware enforce brand + role permissions
- Tích hợp vào RBAC system hiện có (ADR-002)

Use case: Verify business entity: business license, tax ID, company info. Configurable per country.
Note:
- KYB form per country (configurable requirements)
- VN: Giấy phép kinh doanh + MST doanh nghiệp
- PH: SEC Registration + TIN + Mayor's Permit
- Document upload (encrypted storage)
- KYB status: pending → under_review → approved/rejected
- Deferred KYB: cho tạo campaign draft, KYB cần trước khi go-live

Use case: Step-by-step onboarding: profile → branding → market selection → first campaign guide.
Note:
- Guided wizard sau khi login lần đầu
- Step 1: Company profile (name, logo, website)
- Step 2: Branding setup (colors, covers)
- Step 3: Market selection (chọn countries)
- Step 4: First campaign guide (optional)
- Skip & complete later available
- Progress tracker

Use case: Chọn countries sẽ chạy campaign. Activate/deactivate markets.
Note:
- Danh sách active countries trên platform
- Brand chọn markets sẽ hoạt động
- Per market: currency, language info hiển thị
- Activate/deactivate market (không xóa data)
- Market switcher trong Brand Portal header

Use case: Tạo/sửa campaign: wizard multi-step, multilingual content, preview trước submit.
Note:
- Campaign form wizard: info → reward → requirements → content → preview
- Multilingual content per country (local + EN)
- Rich text editor cho description
- Image upload: banner, brand assets
- Preview trước submit
- Save as draft
- Validation: required fields per country

Use case: Cấu hình reward: per view, per post, bonus tiers. Local currency.
Note:
- Reward types: per_view, per_post, per_engagement, bonus_tier
- Bonus tiers: milestone-based (>1000 views → bonus)
- Currency: local currency per country (from Country Config)
- Budget estimation: estimated total cost based on reward + target creators
- Editable khi campaign còn draft

Use case: Set budget cap per campaign. Track spending realtime. Alert thresholds.
Note:
- Set budget cap (local currency)
- Realtime tracking: budget used vs cap
- Alerts: 75% → yellow, 90% → red, 100% → auto-pause option
- Budget increase request (nếu cần admin approval)
- Budget summary per campaign

Use case: Brand draft → submit → Local Admin review → approved/rejected. Feedback loop.
Note:
- Status flow: draft → submitted → admin_review → approved/rejected → active
- Submit: brand gửi campaign cho Admin review
- Admin review: Local Admin approve/reject (với feedback)
- Rejected: brand sửa theo feedback → re-submit
- Approved: brand có thể activate campaign
- Notification mỗi lần status change

Use case: Schedule start/end. Pause/resume. Auto-close khi hết deadline hoặc budget.
Note:
- Schedule: set start date + end date
- Auto-activate khi đến start date (nếu approved)
- Pause/Resume: brand tạm dừng campaign
- Auto-close: hết deadline hoặc budget cap reached
- Status badges rõ ràng

Use case: Clone campaign existing. Template library cho reuse cross-country.
Note:
- Clone from existing campaign (same country hoặc cross-country)
- Pre-fill all fields, editable
- Template library: save campaign as template
- Apply template to different country → auto-adjust currency, language
- Template sharing per brand team

Use case: Visual checklist tạo content requirements: format, duration, platforms, hashtags.
Note:
- Drag-drop requirement builder
- Predefined items: video duration, platform, hashtags, mentions
- Custom requirements (text)
- Preview: hiển thị cho Creator sẽ thấy gì
- Per campaign, đa ngôn ngữ

Use case: Quản lý hashtags per campaign. Auto-assign personal hashtag per creator.
Note:
- Campaign hashtags: brand sets required hashtags
- Personal hashtag: auto-generated per creator per campaign
- Hashtag list view: all hashtags + copy
- Validation: check hashtag uniqueness
- Reuse i18n cho hashtag format per country

Use case: Danh sách creators đã join campaign của brand. Stats per creator (NO PII).
Note:
- Per campaign: list creators đã join
- Info shown: display name, avatar, content count, views, engagement
- NO PII: không hiển thị KYC, bank, tax, email, phone
- Sort: by views, content count, engagement
- Filter: active, completed
- Pagination

Use case: All content submitted cho brand's campaigns. Filterable, searchable.
Note:
- Content list scoped by brand's campaigns
- Filter: campaign, platform, status, date range
- Sort: newest, most views, status
- Count: "156 content cho campaigns của bạn"
- Auto-refresh khi có content mới

Use case: Xem nhanh content: thumbnail, video preview, social link, hashtag check.
Note:
- Inline preview panel (side panel hoặc modal)
- Thumbnail/video preview
- Social media link (click-to-open new tab)
- Hashtag verification: highlight required hashtags present/missing
- Creator info: display name, avatar (NO PII)

Use case: Brand approve/reject content trước khi Ops review (optional per campaign config).
Note:
- Feature flag: enable brand review per campaign
- If enabled: content → brand review → ops review → approved
- If disabled: content → ops review → approved (brand chỉ view)
- Brand approve/reject actions
- Reject: bắt buộc reason
- KHÔNG thay thế Ops review — chỉ pre-screen

Use case: Pipeline view: submitted → brand review → ops review → approved/rejected.
Note:
- Visual pipeline/kanban view per campaign
- Status counts per stage
- Click → xem detail
- Filter by campaign
- Notification khi content thay đổi status

Use case: Top creators per campaign by views/engagement. Leaderboard.
Note:
- Per campaign leaderboard
- Metrics: views, engagement, content count
- Top 10/20/50 creators
- Charts: bar chart performance comparison
- Export top creators list

Use case: Dashboard tổng quan: campaigns, creators, content, spending, engagement.
Note:
- KPI cards: active campaigns, total creators, content count, total spending
- Charts: spending trend, content volume, engagement
- Period: this month, last month, all-time
- Quick links to key actions
- Per country breakdown (nếu multi-market brand)

Use case: Per campaign: creators, content stats, views, engagement, budget utilization.
Note:
- Per campaign detail analytics
- Metrics: creators joined, content submitted/approved/rejected
- Views, engagement (likes, comments, shares)
- Budget: allocated vs spent
- Charts: daily/weekly trend
- Compare with previous campaigns

Use case: Top content, platform breakdown, views/engagement charts.
Note:
- Top performing content list
- Platform breakdown: TikTok vs FB vs IG
- Engagement rate per platform
- Content type analysis
- Charts: content performance over time

Use case: Cost per view, cost per engagement, budget efficiency metrics.
Note:
- ROI metrics: CPV (cost per view), CPE (cost per engagement)
- Budget efficiency: % budget used vs results
- Compare across campaigns
- Compare across countries (multi-market)
- Trend: ROI improvement over time

Use case: Multi-market brands compare performance across countries.
Note:
- Side-by-side: country A vs country B
- Metrics: creators, content, views, spending, ROI
- Normalized to same currency (USD)
- Charts: bar charts per country
- Only for brands active in multiple countries

Use case: Export analytics to Excel/PDF. Schedule weekly/monthly email digest.
Note:
- Export: Excel, PDF, CSV
- Filters apply trước export
- Scheduled reports: weekly or monthly
- Email digest to brand team
- Async export cho data lớn

Use case: Total budget, allocated, spent, remaining per campaign. Realtime.
Note:
- Summary: total budget (all campaigns), allocated, spent, remaining
- Per campaign breakdown
- Spending chart: daily/weekly/monthly
- Currency: local per country + USD reference
- Alert history

Use case: Breakdown cost per campaign, per period, per content type.
Note:
- Per campaign: gross cost, tax (if applicable), net
- Per period: monthly/quarterly summary
- Per content type: video vs photo costs
- Compare campaigns: cost efficiency

Use case: Per campaign hoặc period invoice. PDF download. Annual summary.
Note:
- Digital invoice per campaign/period
- Info: brand, campaign, amount, tax, date, reference
- Download PDF
- Annual summary export
- Invoice template per country

Use case: Spending summary, tax documents per country cho brand accounting.
Note:
- Spending summary per year/quarter
- Tax withholding summary (if platform withholds)
- Per country breakdown
- Export for brand's accountant
- Template per country tax authority

Use case: Quản lý brand profile: name, logo, website, company info.
Note:
- Profile edit page
- Upload logo
- Company info: name, website, description
- Contact info
- Per country: business registration info (từ KYB)
- Audit log cho changes

Use case: Custom branding: colors, covers, landing page per country.
Note:
- Brand colors: primary, secondary
- Cover images per platform (desktop, mobile)
- Landing page customization (cho creator-facing)
- Preview branding changes
- Per country: branding có thể khác nhau

Use case: Branded domain config. DNS verification. SSL setup.
Note:
- Add custom domain (e.g., creator.brandname.com)
- DNS verification guide
- SSL auto-provisioning (Let's Encrypt)
- Domain status tracking
- Per country: different domains possible

Use case: Invite members, assign roles, deactivate, activity log.
Note:
- Invite by email
- Assign role: owner, manager, viewer
- Max team members configurable
- Deactivate/reactivate member
- Activity log per member
- Transfer ownership flow

Use case: Bật/tắt notifications per event type. In-app + email.
Note:
- Event types: campaign status, content submitted, content status, budget alerts
- Channels: in-app, email
- Per member configurable
- Digest frequency: realtime, daily, weekly

Use case: API keys cho brand integration. Webhook events subscription.
Note:
- API key generation (read-only)
- Webhook URL configuration
- Events: campaign_active, content_approved, budget_alert, campaign_completed
- Webhook testing UI (send test event)
- Webhook delivery log
- Rate limiting

Use case: Brand ONLY sees own data. country_code + partner_code enforcement. QC effort.
Note:
- Middleware enforce: country_code + partner_code filter
- Brand KHÔNG thấy: creator PII, other brands, admin ops
- UI: không hiển thị data ngoài scope
- API: reject requests ngoài brand scope
- Integration test: verify data isolation
- QC testing effort chính
